title: Define redacted operator outcome export contract
goal: Define a Chronik-owned, digest-bound transport envelope around the Heimlern-owned operator.routing_outcome.v1 payload without raw logs, secrets, stored freshness verdicts or routing authority.

acceptance.assertion: Chronik owns only the append-only transport envelope; Heimlern remains the canonical routing-outcome payload owner and offline proposal authority.
The validator rejects raw output fields, secret-shaped text and private absolute paths while preserving source, payload, evidence and digest identities.

Payload schema revision, mirror digest, canonical payload digest and deterministic event identity are checked; freshness is recomputed from observation/export times rather than persisted as a mutable verdict.
A fixture-equivalent export and machine-readable validator pass without claiming production sample sufficiency or runtime readiness.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
validation: 264 Chronik tests passed and the Chronik role contract remained valid.
All GitHub checks including CodeQL, AJV fixtures and repository guards passed.
The local mirror is digest-pinned and explicitly mirror_only.

verified_acceptance.contract-owner-clear: The envelope and pin state Chronik transport ownership and Heimlern payload ownership separately.
verified_acceptance.redaction-boundary: Focused tests reject raw output, secret-shaped strings and private absolute paths.
verified_acceptance.digest-and-freshness: Validator binds contract revision, mirror/payload/event digests and requires consumer-side freshness recomputation.
verified_acceptance.fixture-present: The fixture and CLI validator pass while retaining transport-only/no-auto-apply non-claims.

metadata.outcome: A strict transport envelope now exists; it does not provide a live producer or Heimlern consumer.
